name: Julie Thornton
body: Today's a big day. Praying and praising along side u

name: Julie Hickman
body: Lyla, I know you have been through so much and last spring I told you about El Roi… the God who sees me (you Lyla!) and is with me through all my struggles . I know you believe that. Another name for God is Jehovah Rapha the God who heals. We believe God is doing that even now as you wait for your surgery and He has this under control . Our Bible study in Florida prays for you weekly and there were 17 people there Monday Lyla. Love youAunt Julie and Uncle Paul

name: Sondra Rush
body: Thank you for sharing. Love you all and will continue to fight alongside you.

name: Kari Tarvin
body: You've got this! So many warriors all around the country, pushing you guys from behind. We're fighting for you! Love your words Lee. It's been a beautiful thing to watch you all grow, conquering faith and trust over fear. Love you all

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Tears reading this. You all are amazing! We are cheering you on toward that summit and continuing to pray for a bright new journey of healing ahead! Much love! ♥
